author: Prvoslav Savić
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Fully-local, multimodal AI: voice memos, image OCR, whole-vault semantic chat, and AI writing — powered by Gemma 4 on Ollama. Nothing leaves your machine.

name: Vault Brain

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Built and signed in CI with GitHub artifact attestations. See CHANGELOG.md for changes.
releases.name: Vault Brain 0.1.2

releases.author: savicprvoslav
releases.description:
**Vault Brain 0.1.1**

Maintenance release ahead of the community-directory listing.

### Fixed
- **Thinking models** (e.g. `gemma4:12b`): the model's chain-of-thought is now shown as a live "thinking…" indicator and the final answer is captured correctly — selection actions, voice/vision, and the setup test buttons no longer appear to hang.
- Code-quality pass for the plugin review: CSS-class styling (no inline styles), settings headings, stronger typing, popout-window compatibility, and async lifecycle.

### Requirements
Desktop Obsidian 1.5+, [Ollama](https://ollama.com) 0.30.5+, and `gemma4:12b` (+ `nomic-embed-text` for whole-vault search).

### Install (manual)
Copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/vault-brain/`, then enable **Vault Brain** under Settings → Community plugins.
releases.name: Vault Brain 0.1.1

releases.author: savicprvoslav
releases.description:
**Vault Brain 0.1.0 — first release**

Fully-local, multimodal AI for Obsidian via **Gemma 4** on **Ollama**. No cloud, no API keys — nothing leaves your machine.

### Highlights
- 🎙️ **Voice** — voice memo → structured note (transcript + summary + tasks); in-app recording (pause / stop / cancel + mic select), meeting mode, auto-watch folder
- 🖼️ **Vision** — image → Markdown OCR (tables included); PDF → text
- 💬 **Chat** — over the active note + links, or whole-vault semantic RAG with `[[note]]` citations; "Edit this note" (instruction → diff → apply)
- 🔗 **Related-notes sidebar** · ✍️ writing actions, custom prompts, continue-writing, auto-tag, auto-link
- 🔒 **Private by design** — a single auditable localhost network call

### Requirements
Desktop Obsidian 1.5+, [Ollama](https://ollama.com) 0.30.5+, and `gemma4:12b` (+ `nomic-embed-text` for whole-vault search). The in-app guided setup detects everything and one-click-pulls missing models.

### Install (manual)
Copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/vault-brain/`, then enable **Vault Brain** under Settings → Community plugins.
releases.name: Vault Brain 0.1.0
